model.chain_rule: serial length-2 or length-3 tau/mirror-tau composition
model.fixed_input_fiber: one four-color key on the first input stubs is fixed per run
model.switch_rule: single edge-Kempe switch on a two-color component disjoint from both first input stubs and last output stubs

source: Section 9.2 length-2/3 per-input full-interface avoidance lab
